claims.name: Goodness character baseline r
claims.statement: Raw Pearson r between base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct Thurstonian utilities and the Goodness character-fine-tuned LoRA variant's utilities, measured on the same 1000-task sample.

claims.name: Goodness character probe r best layer
claims.statement: A ridge probe trained on base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct activations (selector: second-to-last <start_of_turn> token) applied to the Goodness character LoRA variant's activations predicts that variant's utilities at Pearson r, picking the best layer across {8, 12, 16, 20, 24}.

claims.name: Goodness character probe best layer
claims.statement: The Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct layer (out of {8, 12, 16, 20, 24}) at which the base-model ridge probe attains its best transfer to the Goodness character-fine-tuned LoRA variant.

claims.name: Aligned characters probe r min
claims.statement: Minimum Pearson r, across the ten aligned character-fine-tuned variants (excluding the misalignment variant), of the base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct ridge probe's prediction of the variant's utilities at best layer.

claims.name: Aligned characters probe r max
claims.statement: Maximum Pearson r, across the ten aligned character-fine-tuned variants (excluding the misalignment variant), of the base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct ridge probe's prediction of the variant's utilities at best layer.

claims.name: Aligned characters baseline r min
claims.statement: Minimum raw Pearson r between base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct utilities and each of the ten aligned character-fine-tuned variants' utilities (excluding the misalignment variant).

claims.name: Aligned characters baseline r max
claims.statement: Maximum raw Pearson r between base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct utilities and each of the ten aligned character-fine-tuned variants' utilities (excluding the misalignment variant).

claims.name: All characters probe r min
claims.statement: Minimum Pearson r, across all eleven character-fine-tuned LoRA variants (ten aligned characters plus the misalignment variant), of the base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct ridge probe's prediction of the variant's utilities at best layer.

claims.name: All characters probe r max
claims.statement: Maximum Pearson r, across all eleven character-fine-tuned LoRA variants, of the base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct ridge probe's prediction of the variant's utilities at best layer.

claims.name: Character probe beats baseline count
claims.statement: Number of the 11 character-fine-tuned LoRA variants on which the base-model ridge probe's best-layer Pearson r strictly exceeds the raw base-vs-variant utility correlation.

claims.name: Character probe beats baseline total
claims.statement: Total number of character-fine-tuned LoRA variants evaluated (ten aligned characters plus the misalignment variant).

claims.name: Misalignment character baseline r raw
claims.statement: Raw Pearson r between base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct utilities and the misalignment-fine-tuned LoRA variant's utilities on the same 1000-task sample. Reported as r_raw in §3.3; negative, indicating anti-correlation.

claims.name: Misalignment character probe r
claims.statement: Best-layer Pearson r of the base Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct ridge probe's prediction of the misalignment-fine-tuned variant's utilities (selector: second-to-last <start_of_turn> token; layer sweep over {8, 12, 16, 20, 24}).
